name: @alfadb/pi-stack
description: alfadb's personal pi distribution: vendored gstack + pensieve, ported to pi, plus alfadb-native multi-agent / sediment / model-curator / gbrain extensions.

scripts.vendor:diff:gstack: cd vendor/gstack && git fetch origin && git log --oneline HEAD..origin/main
scripts.vendor:diff:pensieve: cd vendor/pensieve && git fetch origin && git log --oneline HEAD..origin/main
